topics.label: Installation (Idris 2)
topics.description: Install Idris 2. Dependent types let you express invariants in the type system.

topics.label: Types & Functions
topics.description: Type declarations, pattern matching, and totality checking. Types are first-class.

topics.label: Dependent Types
topics.description: Types that depend on values — Vect n a (vector of exactly n elements). Prove properties in types.

topics.label: Interactive Editing
topics.description: Type-driven development with holes (?name). The compiler helps you write code.

topics.label: Interfaces (Type Classes)
topics.description: interface and implementation for ad-hoc polymorphism.

topics.label: Totality
topics.description: Total functions are guaranteed to terminate. Idris checks totality by default.

topics.label: Effects & IO
topics.description: Algebraic effects for managing side effects. Separate pure from effectful code.

topics.label: Proofs
topics.description: Prove theorems about your code using the type system. Correct by construction.
